scripts.lint: eslint packages/redevplugin-ui/src packages/redevplugin-ui/test examples/plugin-ui examples/showcase/app.ts internal/scaffoldtemplate testdata/browser-harness/opaque-surface/*.ts
scripts.build: tsc -p packages/redevplugin-ui/tsconfig.json && npm run browser-harness:generate && npm run scaffold:generate
scripts.test:browser-harness:smoke: npm run build && node internal/browserharness/opaque-surface-smoke.mjs && REDEVPLUGIN_RUN_BROWSER_SMOKE=1 GOWORK=off go test ./cmd/redevplugin -run '^TestExamplesServerBrowserSmoke$' -count=1
scripts.examples: npm run examples:check && npm run build && cargo build -p redevplugin-runtime && GOWORK=off go run ./cmd/redevplugin examples-server dist/examples-state target/debug/redevplugin-runtime
scripts.check: npm run contracts:check && npm run release-metadata:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run browser-harness:typecheck && npm run scaffold:typecheck && npm run examples:typecheck && npm run examples:check && npm run browser-harness:check && npm run scaffold:check && npm run build && npm run test:ui && npm run test:browser-harness && npm run test:browser-harness:smoke
